candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; identical to Net revenue in preview and valid as top-line.
Direct revenue line and same values as Total Revenue; suitable alternative label over time.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; Net revenue is the most direct top-line label, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line; preferred component over total cost-of-revenues subtotal.
Total cost of revenues line, but less preferred than the direct component label because values are identical.

variables.notes: Selected the component-style direct cost line rather than the matching total/subtotal.

candidates.why: Populated operating overhead bucket; fits SG&A better than COGS/D&A/finance items.
Explicit SG&A-type label, but preview is empty; still may be populated in some years.
Explicit SG&A label, but preview is empty; include alongside overhead bucket per rule when SG&A label exists but appears mostly empty.
Can be an SG&A component, but preview is empty and less clearly the main overhead bucket here.
Contains depreciation, which should be excluded from XSGA components.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so included it plus the closest populated overhead bucket. Excluded depreciation-related rows and totals.

candidates.why: Dedicated development/R&D-type expense label; suitable R&D candidate over time.
Development-related but amortization should not be the main R&D line.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Development Costs
candidates.why: Could be a specific R&D subcomponent if used in some years.
Dedicated research expense label; strong R&D candidate over time.
Possible development subcomponent, but less preferred than direct research/development labels.
Explicit R&D label; strong candidate if used in some years.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement expense; not appropriate for XRD expense.
Balance sheet/project label, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using dedicated R&D expense labels as a priority list. Did not include balance-sheet development asset/project rows because XRD should be an expense line.

candidates.why: Finance-expense conceptually relevant, but preview is empty.
Most direct match for interest expense; preferred primary label.
Broader finance-cost line; useful fallback if direct interest expense unavailable in some years.
Interest-related but narrower than total interest expense.
Too broad and not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, narrower and less preferred than main interest expense.

variables.notes: Using a priority list with the specific interest expense line first, then broader finance-cost fallback, then lease-interest fallback.

candidates.why: Generic equity label but preview is empty and less precise than parent-equity line.

candidates.row_label: NTG Nordic Transport Group A/S shareholders share of equity
candidates.why: Explicit parent/shareholders' equity line, which excludes non-controlling interests and is ideal for BE.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when a parent-equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet line, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: NTG Nordic Transport Group A/S shareholders share of equity

variables.notes: Selected the parent/shareholders' equity line to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance sheet minority equity measure.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interests line; ideal for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet non-controlling interests line, consistent with the BE + MIB construction.
